query: SELECT id, phone, messageType, status, createdAt FROM whatsapp_logs WHERE phone LIKE 'whatsapp:%' LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4xeK7FVQkXBtxe6.root --database 45yCshMdhCKkPUhGJzLrcU --execute SELECT id, phone, messageType, status, createdAt FROM whatsapp_logs WHERE phone LIKE 'whatsapp:%' LIMIT 20;
